title: Agent OS ROI review: proof planner confidence and residual risk
goal: Capture the ROI case for proof planning that states confidence and residual risk.
Keep the artifact as review evidence under issue #1115.
scope: Issue #1115 ROI point 3: proof planner with explicit confidence and residual risk.
Current proof-selection output, acceptance reconciliation, and validation-lane expectations.
non_goals: Do not change proof-selection rules in this review.
Do not add new validation commands.

review_mode.review question: Would explicit proof confidence and residual-risk wording reduce false closeout confidence?
review_mode.inputs inspected first: Issue #1115 body, implement proof payload, prior stale proof-selection doc failure from maintainer-surfaces

review_method.commands used: uv run agentic-workspace implement --changed <ten review artifact paths> --task "Create one planning review artifact for each of the ten agent OS capability ROI points from issue #1115" --format json
review_method.evidence sources: GitHub #1115; implement proof.required_commands; implement acceptance_reconciliation; earlier make maintainer-surfaces stale-schema-reference failure noted in this thread

findings.title: Proof selection should say what remains unproven
findings.summary: The selected commands are useful, but the agent still has to judge whether they prove the requested outcome or merely prove schema/planning health. A proof planner that states confidence and residual risk would reduce overclaiming at closeout.
findings.evidence: The implement payload selected `summary` and planning `doctor` for these review artifacts and separately warned that proof should demonstrate acceptance satisfaction, not only command success. Earlier in this thread, `make maintainer-surfaces` failed for a stale generated reference, illustrating that command success/failure needs interpretation against intent.
findings.risk if unchanged: Agents may report successful validation without explaining what user intent remains review-only, or may overrun validation by adding commands that do not map to the requested outcome.
findings.suggested action: Create a child slice that augments proof-selection output with proven dimensions, unproven dimensions, confidence tier, and residual-risk text.
findings.promotion target: GitHub child issue under #1115; Checks / Proof Surfaces inside Planning and Workspace aggregation
findings.promotion trigger: Promote when closeout proof is ambiguous, when a stale/generated proof failure needs classification, or when issue #1106/#1114 style proof-ranking work is selected.
findings.post-remediation note shape: shrink to a pointer to proof-selection child work and validation-lane evidence

recommendation.promote: High-priority child slice; it directly affects closeout honesty.
recommendation.defer: Can wait behind task-contract if the child slices need strict ordering.
recommendation.dismiss: Do not dismiss while proof confidence remains agent-judgment-only.

retention.trigger: Proof-selection output carries confidence and residual-risk fields or a child issue owns the work.
retention.proof surface: Proof-selection command output and validation-lane tests.

validation_commands: uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json
drift_log: 2026-05-24: Review record created from issue #1115 ROI point 3.
